title: Fractured Geometry
lines: As you stare into the walls, the geometric patterns begin to shift and pulse. They aren't static designs; they are complex, interlocking equations written in light.
You feel a strange pulling sensation in your mind, as if your thoughts are being reorganized by the mathematical perfection of the palace.
For a brief moment, you understand the secret language of the stars, but the knowledge is too vast to hold, and it slips away like water through your fingers.
